intent: We are onboarding a new private 5G customer for port logistics operations. Provision a slice for them by end of day.
The stadium authority requested guaranteed bandwidth for their live broadcast crew this weekend.
Spin up a new eMBB slice for the downtown commercial district pilot program.
Our enterprise customer in the mining sector needs a dedicated slice for their autonomous drilling equipment.
Allocate a URLLC slice to support the remote surgery trial at the regional hospital.
The airport authority wants isolated connectivity for their baggage handling automation rollout.
We need to bring a new slice online for the university campus research network by Monday.
Set up a MIoT slice for the smart metering project covering the eastern district.
The event slice provisioned for the trade fair expired three days ago — please tear it down.
Decommission slice NSI-0047 now that the construction monitoring contract has ended.
The pilot for the smart parking project was cancelled. Release whatever resources were assigned to it.
Remove the temporary eMBB slice that was created for the marathon coverage last Sunday.
Our team confirmed the flood response operation is over. Shut down the emergency communications slice.
That drone delivery trial slice has been idle for two weeks. Go ahead and terminate it.
The retail customer did not renew their SLA. Wind down their dedicated slice and return the resources to the pool.
Pull up the full inventory of active network slice instances right now.
What slices are currently running on the core network?
I need a quick overview of all deployed slices for the board report.
Show me the slice catalog along with their current operational states.
Display all network slices that are active in the northern region.
Can you enumerate every slice instance that belongs to the enterprise segment?
Give me the list of slices — I want to cross-check against the billing records.
The V2X slice needs to accommodate more connected vehicles after the highway extension opens next week.
We underestimated device count for the smart grid slice. Push the UE cap up to 50,000.
Registered device count for the wearables slice is hitting the ceiling. Expand the quota.
After the merger, the enterprise slice needs to cover the acquired company's devices too.
Reduce the UE limit on the test slice — we are wasting capacity during off-hours.
The fleet management operator says they are adding 200 new trucks to their telematics platform this quarter.
Festival organizers expect twice as many attendees as last year. Adjust UE capacity on the events slice accordingly.
The IoT platform slice is saturating on concurrent session count during morning data flush cycles.
Increase the PDU session ceiling for the logistics slice — shipment tracking volumes are spiking.
Our SLA with the healthcare customer requires 10,000 simultaneous sessions. Update the slice config to match.
Session exhaustion on the broadband slice was flagged overnight. Raise the PDU limit before the morning peak.
Scale back the PDU session quota on the maintenance slice since the infrastructure work is nearly done.
The surveillance slice needs a higher concurrent session allowance to support the new camera deployments.
Radio resources on the broadband video slice are being squeezed out by other slices during prime time.
Bump the RB ratio for the emergency services slice — first responders are complaining about throughput.
We need to reallocate radio blocks away from the idle enterprise slice toward the eMBB slice tonight.
The autonomous vehicle slice is getting insufficient radio share at the busy highway interchange.
Decrease RB allocation on the default slice to free up resources for the new critical IoT customer.
Adjust the resource block share for the public safety slice before the large-scale evacuation drill tomorrow.
The gNodeB in sector 4 is overloaded — tighten the RRC connection cap on the consumer broadband slice.
RRC signaling load is excessive during school drop-off hours. Apply a stricter connected-user limit on the residential slice.
We want to reserve RRC capacity at the city-center gNB for the URLLC slice by capping the eMBB connected users.
Increase the maximum RRC connections allowed for the public safety slice group at the downtown site.
The RRC connection threshold for the enterprise slice group needs to be raised to handle the new shift start surge.
There is a spike in S1 handover failures on site ENB-2201. What could be causing this?
Multiple customers are reporting intermittent voice drops near the central train station.
Can you check the uplink interference level on Band 78 for the northern cluster?
We have an open P1 ticket about elevated end-to-end latency on the transport backbone — need root cause by EOD.
What is the current throughput utilization across the core network user plane nodes?
A customer is disputing data overage charges from last billing cycle. Can you pull usage logs?
We need to optimize antenna tilt on three sites near the new high-rise development to reduce interference.
There is a critical alarm on the transmission ring between POP-A and POP-B — check fiber status.
ENDC setup failure rate jumped to 12% after last night's software rollout. Investigate before we proceed with further upgrades.
